@if (activeCategory$ | async; as activeCategory) { @if (categories$ | async; as categories) { @for (cat of categories; track cat) { } } }

} @if (total$ | async; as total) {

Total: {{ total }}

}
@if (loading$ | async) {

} @else {
@for (item of products; track item.id) { }

} } } }
